title: ecbolium ecklonianum
intro: Ecbolium ecklonianum, also known as African bugloss, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving respiratory function, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
